query:
WITH target AS MATERIALIZED (
                SELECT id, state, daemon_id, attempt_id
                FROM requests
                WHERE id = $1
                FOR UPDATE
            ),
            updated AS (
                UPDATE requests r
                SET state = 'pending',
                    retry_attempt = $4,
                    not_before = $5,
                    daemon_id = NULL,
                    attempt_id = NULL,
                    processing_admission_id = NULL,
                    claimed_at = NULL,
                    started_at = NULL
                FROM target t
                WHERE r.id = t.id
                  AND t.state IN ('claimed', 'processing')
                  AND t.daemon_id = $2
                  AND t.attempt_id = $3
                RETURNING r.id
            )
            SELECT
                EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM target) AS "exists!",
                EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated) AS "applied!"
